keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Delay in match because of an injury Erik Thommy (LA Galaxy).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, LA Galaxy. Harbor Tarczynski-Miller replaces Erik Thommy because of an injury.
Goal! LA Galaxy 0, Los Angeles Football Club 1. Mark Delgado (Los Angeles Football Club) right footed shot from very close range to the bottom left corner.
Delay in match because of an injury Son Heung-Min (Los Angeles Football Club).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Edwin Cerrillo (LA Galaxy) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
